ksa_text: Knowledge of the regulatory and compliance landscape governing enterprise data and AI systems, including data protection law, AI-specific regulation, sector-specific obligations, cross-jurisdictional requirements, and regulatory authority oversight mechanisms.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of laws, regulations, and policies related to AI, data security/privacy, and use of publicly procured data for government.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of intelligence laws and regulations

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of laws, regulations, and policies related to AI, data security/privacy, and use of publicly procured data for government.
Knowledge of intelligence laws and regulations

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-K-006 (SP, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.5055 is insufficient to establish relevance to market research, survey analysis, and consumer insights at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.505, nist_ai_rmf=0.466, dcwf=0.434) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.5055 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does SP-domain KSA SP-K-006 (composite 0.5055) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: SP domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST CSF, ISO 27001; security competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data access controls awareness, not security architecture. Composite 0.5055 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms SP domain KSA at composite 0.5055 is not a standard requirement for Market Research Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5055, domain SP, scope weak fit. High confidence.
